text: "Confidential Information" shall mean any non-public information disclosed by either party, whether orally or in writing.
The parties will treat certain information as confidential where appropriate.
ABC Corp. and XYZ Inc. are hereinafter referred to as the "Parties."
ABC Corp. and XYZ Inc. are parties to this Agreement.
The Receiving Party shall use the Confidential Information, as defined herein, solely for the Permitted Purpose.
note: Positive example means the reference pattern is present; whether it is actually risky depends on whether a matching definition exists elsewhere, which is what RULE_UNDEFINED_CAPITALIZED_TERM checks for.

text: The Receiving Party shall use the confidential information solely for the stated business purpose.
